_comment: Plan 04-09 fixture: a ReviewDecisionsResult with mode='update' representing the output of `decision update <id> --status followed_up --notes <text>` (or the equivalent MCP path). The decision is the same one as decision-add-happy-path.json but with status flipped to followed_up + outcome_notes populated. The renderer emits the D-21 single-line confirmation: `decision <ulid-prefix> updated to followed_up`.
name: decision-review-interactive-update

decision.decision: sleep at least seven hours on training days
decision.outcomeNotes: held seven-plus hours for six of seven nights
